channel.title: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub
channel.description: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - Powered by RSSHub

item.title: catchorg/Catch2
item.description:
A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

Language: C++
Stars: 20892
Forks: 3427
item.author: catchorg

item.title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
item.description:
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 6979
Forks: 940
item.author: google-labs-code

item.title: hashicorp/terraform
item.description:
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

Language: Go
Stars: 49313
Forks: 10680
item.author: hashicorp

item.description:

item.title: ansible/ansible
item.description:
Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

Language: Python
Stars: 69541
Forks: 24272
item.author: ansible
